info.title: ImprovMX API
info.description: ImprovMX is a free email forwarding service. The API allows you to manage domains, aliases, forwarding rules, SMTP credentials, and view email logs.

get.description: Retrieve account information including billing info, plan details, and resource limits.
Retrieve a list of whitelabel domains associated with the account.
Retrieve a paginated list of domains with optional filtering.

post.description: Add a new domain for email forwarding.

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific domain including aliases (limited to 200).

put.description: Update settings for a specific domain.

delete.description: Remove a domain and all associated aliases.

get.description: Validate MX, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC DNS records for the domain.
Retrieve a paginated list of aliases for a domain.

post.description: Create a new email alias for a domain.

forward.description: Destination email address(es) or webhook URL(s)

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific alias.

put.description: Update the forwarding destination for an alias.

delete.description: Remove a specific alias from a domain.
Remove all aliases from a domain.

post.description: Add, update, or delete up to 500 aliases in a single request.

aliases.description: Array of alias objects to process

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of forwarding rules for a domain.

post.description: Create a new forwarding rule for a domain.

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific forwarding rule.

put.description: Update the configuration of a forwarding rule.

delete.description: Remove all forwarding rules from a domain.

post.description: Add, update, or delete multiple forwarding rules in a single request.

get.description: Retrieve email event logs for a domain.
Retrieve email event logs filtered for a specific alias.
Search email event logs with filters for a domain.
Retrieve SMTP credentials for a domain.

post.description: Create a new SMTP credential for a domain.

put.description: Update the password for an SMTP credential.

basicAuth.description: Basic authentication with username 'api' and your API key as the password.
